textDisplay:
I said i was never ever going to watch the "new" jumanji because i honestly didnt want to believe it existed.
I grew up with the Robin Williams film.
But today my curiosity got the better of me and i watched it on Netflix.
I was suprised to find it actually carries on from the old 90s jumanji quite well and even pays tribute to Robin Williams character in one of the scenes, which i thought was cool. 
I never thought id say this but im now looking forward to seeing this new one when it comes out.
textOriginal:
I said i was never ever going to watch the "new" jumanji because i honestly didnt want to believe it existed.
I grew up with the Robin Williams film.
But today my curiosity got the better of me and i watched it on Netflix.
I was suprised to find it actually carries on from the old 90s jumanji quite well and even pays tribute to Robin Williams character in one of the scenes, which i thought was cool. 
I never thought id say this but im now looking forward to seeing this new one when it comes out.

textDisplay:
Did you say "NEXT LEVEL"?

As is the next chapter of the JUMANJI saga?

That's perfect and phenomenal!!😁😁 That was only the beginning of a new partnership between Disney and Sony Pictures, just like that!!!

And here's how it looks:

First, there was "JUMANJI (1995)" as the first film!! Then, there was "JUMANJI: the animated series (1996-99)" as take place during the events of the first film!! Followed by "Zathura: A Space Adventure (2005)" as the film is taking place in the world of JUMANJI!! Then, there was "JUMANJI: Welcome to the Jungle" (2017)" as the second film!!!!

And now, there was the third film is "JUMANJI: The Next Level (2019)", which is Coming to theaters, Friday the 13th as Friday, December 13th, 2019!!!

Ready to PLAY?

textDisplay: Well, I think a sequel to Zathura is a great idea.
textOriginal: Well, I think a sequel to Zathura is a great idea.

textDisplay: What I’d do is have it be about a family that’s been fractured by the death of the father. The mother is overworking herself and has barely any time for her kids anymore, the youngest child had become increasingly bratty and obnoxious due to the mother not being there as much, the older sibling has completely shut herself off from the family and the brother of the father has fallen into bad habits like Thor in Endgame. But they find the Zathura game and have to learn to work together as a family again with the bratty child having to learn responsibility as the courageous ships Captain, the mother learning to be more there for her kids to keep her family safe as the ships badass head of security, the older sibling has to learn to care and look out for the family again as the ships loyal medical robot and the brother has to learn to find passion in life again as the ships extremely skilled pilot
textOriginal: What I’d do is have it be about a family that’s been fractured by the death of the father. The mother is overworking herself and has barely any time for her kids anymore, the youngest child had become increasingly bratty and obnoxious due to the mother not being there as much, the older sibling has completely shut herself off from the family and the brother of the father has fallen into bad habits like Thor in Endgame. But they find the Zathura game and have to learn to work together as a family again with the bratty child having to learn responsibility as the courageous ships Captain, the mother learning to be more there for her kids to keep her family safe as the ships badass head of security, the older sibling has to learn to care and look out for the family again as the ships loyal medical robot and the brother has to learn to find passion in life again as the ships extremely skilled pilot
